title: DraftRun
description: The audited capture record of a §18 draft run (workflow-designer design §18): which working copy's document a run executes, at which etag, who started it, and where — persisted alongside the captured package in the draft-run store, keyed by the run id.

runId.description: The id of the durable run this capture belongs to (the draft-run store key).

workingCopyId.description: The working copy the draft was captured from — the §18 audit tuple's working-copy member, and the run's row-security scope (sys:workingCopy).

workflowId.description: The workflow within the captured document the run executes (the document's FIRST workflow — the capture reorders the workflows array).

documentEtag.description: The working copy's document etag at capture — the audited draft identity; later edits to the working copy do not affect the run.

environment.description: The development-class environment the run is pinned to (its allowsDraftRuns gate passed at start).

startedBy.description: The audit actor who started the run.

contentHash.description: The canonical content hash of the captured { workflow, sources } (WorkflowPackage.ComputeContentHash) — the runner's compile-cache key and the executor manifest's integrity binding.
